to stream music from your smart device, USB, NAS or streaming services, such as Spotify, Tidal, Deezer, 
Qobuz, Amazon Music and others by 4STREAM App, AirPlay, Bluetooth or other DLNA apps. Adding more 
units to your home audio system can set up a wireless multiroom or multizone whole house audio system, 
it will give you totally new and great experience to play and enjoy your music.

title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Air (Crest 1/Alpine White) SLBY1B01

The Air Series is the thinnest switch ever launched by LifeSmart. Unlike previous series, it features an AG glass surface. With a faceplate thickness of just 3.7mm and a standard 86×86mm size, it comes in one-, two-, and four-button layouts, perfectly fitting common backboxes.

description:
The Ultra Series measures 316×170mm and features the all-new SUBLIME OS, for seamless control of lighting, shading, environment, security, and audio- visual-all accessible from a single touch display. Additionally, it offers AirTalkTM intercom and offline voice for added convenience.
Adapter: 1. For 220V power supply, an additional order of Sublime Actuator 2-Channel Switch (11.0116220) or Sublime Actuator 4-Channel Switch (11.016240) is required.
